title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 30 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Panamax values rose in response to high prices achieved by last week's Mont Blanc Hawk and Marinicki C sales.Supramax values dipped in response to the soft pricing of the Ocean Bright. Supramax Ocean Bright (56,000 DWT, 2013, Mitsui) sold by Ming Tai Shipping Corp DD Passed for USD 19.2 mil, VV Value USD 21.0 mil. Handy Sun Grace (33,700 DWT, 2004, Oshima) sold by STX Sun Ace Shipping to Greek buyers for USD 7.25 mil, VV Value USD 8.0 mil.
